resources.string: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
The request timed out. Please try again later.
The request was redirected. Please retry.
Something went wrong. Please try again.
Server error. Please try again later.
Invalid API key. Try again later.
You are not authorized. Please login again.
Access is forbidden. Please try again later.
Too many requests. Please slow down and try again.
The requested item was not found.
Invalid data provided. Please check and try again.
Corrupt database error. Try restarting the app.
Disk access error. Please check your storage.
An unknown error occurred. Please try again.
